metadata.name: MD; Slippery When Wet appearance of evil
metadata.author: Hexcollie, Suksma n New Adam Master
metadata.source: Hexcollie, Suksma n New Adam Master - MD; Slippery When Wet appearance of evil.milk

perFrameCode: // This is the version you should use...
ob_r=sw1+sw2*(2-h)+sw5*(h-4)+sw6;  // resulting Red value, assign it to q1
ob_g=sw1*h+sw2+sw3+sw4*(4-h);      // resulting Green value, assign it to q2
ob_b=sw3*(h-2)+sw4+sw5+sw6*(6-h);  // resulting Blue value, assign it to q3
